prompt: Overhead flat lay of two rustic artisan sourdough boules with scored golden crusts and a few soft pink peony blossoms, all arranged around the outer edges and corners of a bright white marble countertop, light dusting of flour, a pale blush linen cloth in one corner, the entire center of the frame deliberately left empty as clean luminous marble, soft natural window light, airy bright and high-key, cream white and blush pink palette, editorial food photography, no text, no lettering, no people, no hands
